title: Experiments Index
description: Use this folder for dated, narrative experiment notes:
html:
Experiments Index

Status: Experiment index Audience: Team, AI agents Purpose: Entry point into dated experiment logs, evaluations, retrains, and benchmark changes

Use this folder for dated, narrative experiment notes:

  • benchmark changes
  • evaluation rounds
  • retraining results
  • acquisition-wave measurements
  • autoresearch observations and decisions

Current logs

  • 2026-03-17 — ML detection iteration log
  • 2026-03-20 — Multi-instance evaluation and improvement
  • 2026-03-21 — Anonymous holdout rework
  • 2026-03-21 — Acquisition wave retrain and evaluation

Recommended log shape

Each experiment note should stay compact and follow the same structure:

  1. Context
  2. Problem or goal
  3. Commands run
  4. Results
  5. Interpretation
  6. Decision or next step
